home.heroTitle: Welcome to Madre Maria Pia Notari School
home.heroDescription: A beacon of Catholic education in the heart of the community, providing quality learning experiences rooted in faith, excellence, and service.
home.missionStatement: To provide holistic Catholic education that nurtures the intellectual, spiritual, moral, and physical development of every child.
home.visionStatement: A community of lifelong learners who are compassionate leaders, critical thinkers, and responsible citizens guided by faith and values.

heroSlides.title: Excellence Through Faith
heroSlides.subtitle: Developing Global Leaders Rooted in Faith
heroSlides.description: Welcome to Madre Maria Pia Notari School, where we blend 35+ years of academic tradition with a vibrant Catholic charism to nurture the leaders of tomorrow.

heroSlides.title: Christmas & New Year Dance
heroSlides.subtitle: FESTIVE CELEBRATION
heroSlides.description: Our students bring joy and talent to the stage in our annual holiday presentation. A vibrant celebration of our community's spirit as we welcome the new year with dance and gratitude.

heroSlides.title: Tradition of Service
heroSlides.subtitle: Rooted in Eucharistic Adoration
heroSlides.description: Guided by the spiritual legacy of the Sisters Adorers of the Holy Eucharist, we integrate devotion and discipline into every aspect of campus life.

heroSlides.title: School Community Mass
heroSlides.subtitle: EUCHARISTIC CELEBRATION
heroSlides.description: Rooted in the Sisters Adorers charism, our school community gathers regularly for the Holy Sacrifice of the Mass, the source and summit of our Christian life and academic discipline.

about.title: About MMPNS
about.introduction: Madre Maria Pia Notari School (MMPNS) has been a cornerstone of Catholic education since its founding. Named after our patroness, the school embodies her spirit of service, compassion, and dedication to youth formation.
about.history: Founded by the Sisters of the Holy Spirit, MMPNS began as a small community school serving local families. Over the decades, it has grown into a respected institution known for academic excellence and values formation.

coreValues.title: Faith
coreValues.description: Grounded in Catholic teachings and lived spirituality

coreValues.title: Excellence
coreValues.description: Commitment to academic rigor and continuous improvement

coreValues.title: Service
coreValues.description: Dedication to serving God and neighbor with compassion

contact.address: 123 Education Avenue, Quezon City, Metro Manila
